SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-30-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-25-2013 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506).
